title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Kizaru, Unknown person #5, Vegapunk, Unknown person #6 as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: LABO- Stratum

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aren't you going to drink...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That "vega-coffee" of yours?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't tease me, Shaka. It's too hot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You know my tongue's as sensitive as a cat's.

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: There's only four minutes left now, Vegapunk.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is definitely the same room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Sip Sip... Aagh!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no doubt this is where it was filmed, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Woah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Wait a sec! Don't do anything crazy!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Vegapunk, there's not enough time..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: See! You didn't stop Diddy Squat!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we can cool the coffee down if we use a thermoelectric device...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: To alternate the-

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: IF I WERE STELLA...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd have made sure the broadcast snail was well hidden!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then I shall continue until the entire lab is vaporized.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That'd be a mistake! The second floor of building B is dedicated to weapons development!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the first floor houses the power station!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not only that, but the third floor of building C stores a number of high pressure gas cylinders:

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you damage any of those, the resulting explosion...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: ...will blow punk records to smither teens!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then think of a solution. You satellites all share an identical thought process, correct?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, I know exactly how to stop this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Besides, we don't wanna rack up any more "sins".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Our relationship is already troubled enough.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I sense the 'voice' of a small life form above...

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: You mean from punk records?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he hid the snail there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll be one of the broadcast snails we recently finished developing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're shaped like this, with a sort of triangular shell!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Where is the entrance?

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
